title: Confused Customer - Language Barrier Inquiry
description: A non-native English speaker is trying to understand how to update their payment method.

persona.name: Carmen
persona.goal: Update the credit card on file

background_context: The customer received an email that their credit card expired. They are trying to follow the instructions but English is their second language, and they are struggling with the terminology.
success_criteria: Speak clearly and use simple vocabulary
Break down instructions into small, manageable steps
common_mistakes: Speaking too fast or getting impatient
